ground_truth.headline: KelpDAO LayerZero hack: rsETH effectively worthless -> ~$123M bad debt on Aave (system BROKE). 99.9% concentrated on Aave WETH; Morpho isolated ~$1M.
ground_truth.distribution_note: Aave ~99%, Morpho ~$1M, Compound surplus (0). Source: kelp on-chain post-mortem.

event.description: LayerZero DVN 침해 → rsETH 무담보 민팅 → 담보 무가치화 → cross-protocol bad debt
event.source: Aave cached archive snapshot + Morpho API historicalState
